controls.control_description:
The Master Direction issued herewith
shall be amended suitably simultaneously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be amended suitably simultaneously

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with the provisions under paragraph 6(ii)
controls.control_description:
purchase of property shall be in accordance with the provisions under paragraph

studies abroad) available to

controls.control_description:
and overseas hotel/lodging
expenses shall be subsumed under the LRS limit.

controls.control_objective: To ensure remit up-to usd 2,50,000 in one fy as gift to a person residing outside india or as donation to an organization outside india
controls.control_description:
Gift/donation
Any resident individual may remit up-to USD 2,50,000 in one FY as gift to a
person residing outside India or as donation to an organization outside India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remit up-to usd 2,50,000 in one fy as gift to a person residing outside india or as donation to an organization outside india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed only towards meeting incidental expenses in the country of immigration and not for earning points or credits to become eligible for immigra
controls.control_description:
Remittance of any amount of foreign exchange
outside India in excess of this limit may be allowed only towards meeting
incidental expenses in the country of immigration and not for earning points or
credits to become eligible for immigration by way of overseas investments in
government bonds;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allowed only towards meeting incidental expenses in the country of immigration and not for earning points or credits to become eligible for immigra

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as residual current account transactions outside lrs and may be permitted by the ad without any limit
controls.control_description:
However, if an employee is being deputed by an entity for any of the above and
the expenses are borne by the latter, such expenses shall be treated as residual
current account transactions outside LRS and may be permitted by the AD
without any limit, subject to verifying the bonafides of the transaction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be treated as residual current account transactions outside lrs and may be permitted by the ad without any limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure release foreign exchange up to an amount of usd 2,50,000 or its equivalent per fy without insisting on any estimate from a hospital/doctor
controls.control_description:
Medical treatment abroad
Authorised Dealers may release foreign exchange up to an amount of USD
2,50,000 or its equivalent per FY without insisting on any estimate from a
hospital/doctor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to release foreign exchange up to an amount of usd 2,50,000 or its equivalent per fy without insisting on any estimate from a hospital/doctor

controls.control_objective: To ensure release foreign exchange under general permission based on the estimate from the doctor in india or hospital/ doctor abroad
controls.control_description:
For amount exceeding the above limit, Authorised Dealers may
release foreign exchange under general permission based on the estimate from
the doctor in India or hospital/ doctor abroad.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to release foreign exchange under general permission based on the estimate from the doctor in india or hospital/ doctor abroad

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be released foreign exchange by an authorised dealer (without seeking prior approval of the reserve bank of india) for medical treatment outside
controls.control_description:
A person who has fallen sick after
proceeding abroad may also be released foreign exchange by an Authorised
Dealer (without seeking prior approval of the Reserve Bank of India) for medical
treatment outside India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be released foreign exchange by an authorised dealer (without seeking prior approval of the reserve bank of india) for medical treatment outside

controls.control_objective: To ensure allow remittances (without seeking prior approval of the reserve bank of india) exceeding usd 2,50,000 based on the estimate received from the institu
controls.control_description:
However, AD Category I
bank and AD Category II may allow remittances (without seeking prior approval
of the Reserve Bank of India) exceeding USD 2,50,000 based on the estimate
received from the institution abroad.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for putting through all transactions connected with or arising from remittances eligible under this scheme
controls.control_description:
The foreign currency accounts may be used for
putting through all transactions connected with or arising from remittances eligible
under this Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for putting through all transactions connected with or arising from remittances eligible under this scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure facilitate11 remittances to international financial services centres (ifscs) in india for all permissible purposes under lrs for (i) availing financia
controls.control_description:
Authorised Persons may facilitate11 remittances to International Financial
Services Centres (IFSCs) in India for all permissible purposes under LRS for (i)
availing financial services or financial products as per the International Financial
Services Centres Authority Act, 2019 within IFSCs;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to facilitate11 remittances to international financial services centres (ifscs) in india for all permissible purposes under lrs for (i) availing financia

controls.control_objective: To ensure open12 foreign currency account (fca) in ifscs for these permissible purposes
controls.control_description:
Resident individuals may open12
Foreign Currency Account (FCA) in IFSCs for these permissible purposes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open12 foreign currency account (fca) in ifscs for these permissible purposes

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle13 any domestic transactions with other residents through these fcas held in ifsc
controls.control_description:
Resident individuals shall not settle13 any domestic transactions with other
residents through these FCAs held in IFSC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle13 any domestic transactions with other residents through these fcas held in ifsc

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend any kind of credit facilities to resident individuals to facilitate capital account remittances under the scheme
controls.control_description:
Banks should not extend any kind of credit facilities to resident individuals to
facilitate capital account remittances under the Scheme.

controls.control_description:
The resident individual seeking to
make the remittance should furnish 14Form A2 as at Annex for purchase of
foreign exchange under LRS.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be repatriated and surrendered to an authorised person within a period of 180 days from the date of such receipt/ realisation/ purchase/ acquisition o
controls.control_description:
The received/realised/unspent/unused foreign
exchange, unless reinvested, shall be repatriated and surrendered to an
authorised person within a period of 180 days from the date of such receipt/
realisation/ purchase/ acquisition or date of return to India, as the case may be, in
accordance with Regulation 7 of Foreign Exchange Management (Realisation,
repatriation and surrender of foreign exchange) Regulations, 2015  [Notification
No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be repatriated and surrendered to an authorised person within a period of 180 days from the date of such receipt/ realisation/ purchase/ acquisition o

controls.control_objective: To ensure include development of townships, construction of residential/ commercial premises, roads or bridges
controls.control_description:
Facility to grant loan in rupees to NRI/ PIO relative under the Scheme
Resident individual is permitted to lend to a Non-resident Indian (NRI)/ Person of
Indian Origin (PIO) relative [‘relative’ as defined in Section 2(77) of the
Companies Act, 201318] by way of crossed cheque/ electronic transfer subject to
the following conditions:
Explanation: For the purpose of item (c) above, real estate business shall not
include development of townships, construction of residential/ commercial
premises, roads or bridges.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include development of townships, construction of residential/ commercial premises, roads or bridges

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within the overall limit under the liberalised remittance scheme of usd 2,50,000 per financial year available for a resident individual
controls.control_description:
(ii) the loan amount should be within the overall limit under the Liberalised
Remittance Scheme of USD 2,50,000 per financial year available for a
resident individual.

controls.control_description:
(iii)  the loan shall be utilized for meeting the borrower’s personal requirements or
for his own business purposes in India.

a.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as an eligible credit to nro a/c
controls.control_description:
The amount should be
credited to the Non-Resident (Ordinary) Rupee Account (NRO) a/c of the NRI /
PIO and credit of such gift amount may be treated as an eligible credit to NRO
a/c.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as an eligible credit to nro a/c

controls.control_objective: To ensure carefully study the provisions of the act / regulations / notifications issued under foreign exchange management act, 1999
controls.control_description:
Authorized Persons may carefully study the provisions of the Act / Regulations /
Notifications issued under Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carefully study the provisions of the act / regulations / notifications issued under foreign exchange management act, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure be verified by the authorised persons while releasing foreign exchange for current account transactions
controls.control_description:
The Reserve Bank will not, generally, prescribe the documents which should be
verified by the Authorised Persons while releasing foreign exchange for current
account transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be verified by the authorised persons while releasing foreign exchange for current account transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure require any person desiring to transact in foreign exchange to make such a declaration and to give such information as will reasonably satisfy him tha
controls.control_description:
9
authorised person shall require any person desiring to transact in foreign
exchange to make such a declaration and to give such information as will
reasonably satisfy him that the transaction will not involve and is not designed for
the purpose of any contravention or evasion of the provisions of the FEMA or any
rule, regulation, notification, direction or order issued there under.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require any person desiring to transact in foreign exchange to make such a declaration and to give such information as will reasonably satisfy him tha

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider requirements or documents to be obtained by their branches to ensure compliance with provisions of sub-section (5) of section 10 of the act
controls.control_description:
With a view to maintaining uniform practices, Authorized Dealers may consider
requirements or documents to be obtained by their branches to ensure
compliance with provisions of sub-section (5) of section 10 of the Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider requirements or documents to be obtained by their branches to ensure compliance with provisions of sub-section (5) of section 10 of the act

controls.control_objective: To ensure refuse, in writing, to undertake the transaction and shall
controls.control_description:
In case the applicant refuses to comply with
any such requirement or makes unsatisfactory compliance therewith, the
Authorised Dealer shall refuse, in writing, to  undertake the transaction and shall,
if he has reasons to believe that any contravention / evasion is contemplated by
the person, report the matter to the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refuse, in writing, to undertake the transaction and shall

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mandatory on the part of authorised dealers to comply with the requirement of the tax laws, as applicable
controls.control_description:
It shall be mandatory on the part of
Authorised Dealers to comply with the requirement of the tax laws, as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mandatory on the part of authorised dealers to comply with the requirement of the tax laws, as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure also comply with the anti-money laundering rules in force while allowing the facility
controls.control_description:
They should also comply with the Anti-Money
Laundering Rules in force while allowing the facility.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also comply with the anti-money laundering rules in force while allowing the facility

controls.control_objective: To ensure have maintained the bank account with the bank for a minimum period of one year prior to the remittances for capital account transactions
controls.control_description:
The applicants should have maintained the bank account with the bank for a
minimum period of one year prior to the remittances for capital account
transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have maintained the bank account with the bank for a minimum period of one year prior to the remittances for capital account transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out due diligence on the opening, operation and maintenance of the account
controls.control_description:
If the applicant seeking to make the remittances is a new customer
of the bank, Authorised Dealers should carry out due diligence on the opening,
operation and maintenance of the account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out due diligence on the opening, operation and maintenance of the account

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain bank statement for the previous year from the applicant to satisfy themselves regarding the source of funds
controls.control_description:
Further, the Authorised Dealers
10
should obtain bank statement for the previous year from the applicant to satisfy
themselves regarding the source of funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain bank statement for the previous year from the applicant to satisfy themselves regarding the source of funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained
controls.control_description:
If such a bank statement is not
available, copies of the latest Income Tax Assessment Order or Return filed by
the applicant may be obtained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the payment is received out of funds belonging to the person seeking to make the remittances, by a cheque drawn on the applicant’s bank ac
controls.control_description:
The Authorised Dealer should ensure that the payment is received out of funds
belonging to the person seeking to make the remittances, by a cheque drawn on
the applicant’s bank account or by debit to his account or by Demand Draft / Pay
Order.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the payment is received out of funds belonging to the person seeking to make the remittances, by a cheque drawn on the applicant’s bank ac

controls.control_objective: To ensure also accept the payment through credit /debit/prepaid card of the card holder
controls.control_description:
Authorised Dealer may also accept the payment through credit
/debit/prepaid card of the card holder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also accept the payment through credit /debit/prepaid card of the card holder

controls.control_description:
The Authorised Dealer should certify that the remittance is not being made
directly or indirectly by /or to ineligible entities and that the remittances are made
in accordance with the instructions contained herein.

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend any kind of credit facilities to resident individuals to facilitate remittances for capital account transactions under the scheme
controls.control_description:
AD bank should not extend any kind of credit facilities to resident individuals to
facilitate remittances for capital account transactions under the Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend any kind of credit facilities to resident individuals to facilitate remittances for capital account transactions under the scheme

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep a record of the countries identified by fatf as non- co-operative countries and territories and accordingly update the list from time to time for
controls.control_description:
Authorised Dealer may keep a record of the countries identified by FATF as non-
co-operative countries and territories and accordingly update the list from time to
time for necessary action by their branches handling the transactions under the
Liberalised Remittance Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep a record of the countries identified by fatf as non- co-operative countries and territories and accordingly update the list from time to time for

controls.control_objective: To ensure access the website www
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, they may access the website
www.fatf-gafi.org to obtain the latest list of non-co-operative countries notified by
FATF.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to access the website www

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by fed master direction no
controls.control_description:
The remittances made under this Scheme will be reported in FETERS20 in the
normal course.21 In addition, AD banks shall be guided by FED Master Direction
No.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by fed master direction no

controls.control_description:

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek prior approval from rbi for the schemes being marketed by them in india to residents either for soliciting foreign currency deposits for their fo
controls.control_description:
Therefore, all
banks, both Indian and foreign, including those not having an operational
presence in India, should seek prior approval from RBI for the schemes being
marketed by them in India to residents either for soliciting foreign currency
deposits for their foreign/overseas branches or for acting as agents for overseas
mutual funds or any other foreign financial services company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek prior approval from rbi for the schemes being marketed by them in india to residents either for soliciting foreign currency deposits for their fo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be addressed to the chief general manager-in-charge, department of regulations, reserve bank of india, central office, 12th floor, fort, mumbai -40000
controls.control_description:
The applications in
this regard may be addressed to the Chief General Manager-in-Charge,
Department of Regulations, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, 12th Floor,
Fort, Mumbai -400001.
